1101001111101000 0111101010011111 0 -> sum: 0100111010000111, cout: 1

0110100000101110 0101111100100101 1 -> sum: 1100011101010100, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
